navbar.admin_access_locked_description: Moderation tools were locked for this browser session.

footer.summary: PVHS lost-and-found system with reporting, search, claims, moderation, and documentation.
footer.local_storage_notice: This judging build stores data locally in the current browser for demo purposes.

home.front_desk_note: Public listings and staff-reviewed reports for school-day lost-and-found.
home.title: Find a lost item at PVHS
home.subtitle: Check the public found-item list before filing a report. If nothing matches, staff can review a lost or found item submission.
home.preview_title: Real item photos make the next step easier.
home.next_step_helper: Use these only when the public list does not already have the item.
home.search_step_description: Look for a match in the approved found-item inventory before filing a new report.
home.search_help: Use a few words, like the item type, brand, color, or where it was found.
home.lost_description: Submit a lost-item report, keep the case active, and review suggested matches as new items come in.
home.lost_helper: Tell staff what is missing and where you last remember having it.
home.found_description: Create a moderated item record with photos and details so the owner can recognize it quickly.
home.found_helper: Send staff the item details and photo before it appears publicly.
home.recently_approved_subtitle: New public listings from staff review.
home.no_approved_items: No approved items are available yet.
home.quick_search_placeholder: Or, search the found items inventory directly...
home.my_dashboard_description: Track notifications, claim activity, and updates tied to your account.
home.project_documentation_description: Open setup, sources, and accessibility notes for this project.
home.admin_workspace_active: Review pending items, claims, and reports.
home.admin_workspace_inactive: Switch to admin view when you need moderation tools.
home.admin_summary_subtitle: Moderation workload is shown only in admin mode.
home.recent_admin_activity_subtitle: Latest moderation and workflow changes recorded in this workspace.
home.moderator_active_desc: Review pending items, claims, and reports.

search.title: Search found items and active lost reports.
search.subtitle: Search matches titles, descriptions, tags, brand, color, and location. Claimed or returned found items stay out of the public results, while unresolved lost reports remain visible.
search.broaden_search: Try a broader description or remove one of the filters.
search.found_subtitle: Search the verified found-item inventory and request a claim when something matches.
search.filter_description: Refine results by category, color, location, and date range so the most relevant items surface first.
search.lost_item_cta_title: Don't see your missing item listed?
search.lost_item_cta_desc: File a lost item report. PVHS staff will check the inventory and follow up.

report_found.submitted_description: Your report is now in the moderation queue. After approval, it will become searchable for claimants while private storage details remain restricted to administrators.
report_found.title: Create a clear found-item record.
report_found.subtitle: Enter the details students will search for later, keep storage information private, and send the item into the admin review queue.
report_found.public_listing_description: Search pages stay public, but the storage or pickup field is restricted to administrators.
report_found.reviewed_first_description: Submitted items are saved immediately, but only approved records appear in public search results.
report_found.item_details_description: Write the record the way a student would search for it later.
report_found.description_placeholder: Describe color, markings, contents, stickers, damage, or anything a real owner would notice.
report_found.description_enhanced_message: A cleaner version of your description was suggested.
report_found.suggested_tags_description: Useful for search, but kept visually lightweight.
report_found.location_and_time_description: Keep the public discovery details clear, then record private storage information separately.
report_found.storage_admin_only: This field is visible only to administrators.
report_found.your_information_description: Contact details are stored only so staff can verify the record if needed.
report_found.signed_in_as: Signed in as {{name}}. Contact fields stay blank unless you choose to fill them in.
report_found.privacy_consent_text: I consent to my contact information being stored in this demo build and used only for reuniting the item with its owner. *
report_found.terms_text: I confirm that this record is accurate to the best of my knowledge. *
report_found.missing_fields_message: Please fill in all required fields.
report_found.submit_failed: Failed to submit. Please try again.

report_lost.missing_fields_message: Please fill in all required fields.
report_lost.matching_description: Comparing your lost item against {{count}} found items in the current data set...
report_lost.matching_hint: This usually takes a few seconds
report_lost.submitted_subtitle: Here are the strongest suggested matches based on the current item records.
report_lost.no_matches_description: We'll continue scanning new found items and notify you if a match appears.
report_lost.title: Describe what went missing.
report_lost.subtitle: The matching engine will compare your report against currently stored found-item records and surface the closest matches.
report_lost.description_placeholder: Describe your item in detail, including markings, stickers, contents, or anything else that helps identify it.
report_lost.additional_notes_placeholder: Any other details that might help identify your item
report_lost.confirm_text: I confirm this lost-item report is accurate to the best of my knowledge. *

claim_item.reason_required: Please explain why this is yours
claim_item.truthful_required: You must confirm this is truthful
claim_item.submitted_description: Your ownership details are now in the review queue. The admin team can verify the claim and the return will stay open until you confirm the item was received.
claim_item.item_not_found_description: This listing is no longer available or the link is invalid.
claim_item.title: Verify that this item belongs to you.
claim_item.subtitle: Share details that only the owner would know. Claims are reviewed before the return is marked complete.
claim_item.review_compare: Admins compare your details against the item record.
claim_item.review_pickup: Pickup timing can be coordinated after approval.
claim_item.review_close: The claim closes only after you confirm receipt.
claim_item.your_information_description: These details let staff reach you and confirm identity during pickup.
claim_item.ownership_description: Provide details that would not normally appear in the public listing.
claim_item.reason: Why do you believe this is yours? *
claim_item.reason_placeholder: Describe when you lost it, where you last saw it, and what makes you confident it is yours.
claim_item.identifying_details: Identifying details only you would know
claim_item.identifying_placeholder: Scratches, stickers, lock code format, wallpaper, contents, or anything not obvious from the outside.
claim_item.pickup_placeholder: Example: lunch period, after school Monday-Wednesday
claim_item.truthful_text: I confirm that the information provided is truthful and accurate. I understand that false claims may lead to disciplinary action. *

item_details.item_not_found_description: This item may have been removed or doesn't exist.
item_details.possible_matches_one: {{count}} possible match is already attached to this lost report.
item_details.possible_matches_other: {{count}} possible matches are already attached to this lost report.
item_details.privacy_note_lost: Lost reports stay visible so other users can compare their found item against them.
item_details.privacy_note_found: Finder contact info and exact storage location are kept private. Submit a claim to verify ownership.

user_dashboard.return_confirmed_message: The claim has been marked complete and the item is now recorded as returned.
user_dashboard.rating_submitted_message: Your rating is now waiting for admin approval.
user_dashboard.sign_in_title: Sign in to view your dashboard
user_dashboard.sign_in_description: Sign in on this device to see your reports, claims, and notifications.
user_dashboard.title: My Dashboard
user_dashboard.welcome: Welcome back{{suffix}}. Track your reports and claims here.
user_dashboard.no_lost_reports: You haven't submitted any lost item reports yet.
user_dashboard.no_claims: You haven't submitted any claims yet.
user_dashboard.received_question: Have you received this item back?
user_dashboard.received_description: Confirm the return once the item is back in your hands so the record can be closed properly.
user_dashboard.rating_reviewed: Ratings are reviewed by an admin before they appear publicly.
user_dashboard.rating_placeholder: Optional note about the return experience
user_dashboard.review_visible: Your approved review is now visible on the item page.
user_dashboard.review_pending: Your rating is waiting for admin approval.
user_dashboard.review_rejected: Your last rating was not approved. Update it below and resubmit.
user_dashboard.ai_suggested_matches_desc: We found matching items reported around the time you lost yours. Tap a card to claim it.

admin_dashboard.title: Review items, claims, and reports from one dashboard.
admin_dashboard.subtitle: This area keeps moderation work separate from the public search pages and surfaces the records that still need action.
admin_dashboard.found_items_queue_desc: Approve or reject newly submitted found items before they go public.
admin_dashboard.claims_queue_desc: Verify ownership proof and details to approve or decline claims against found items.

admin_overview.items_by_category_description: Top categories in the current inventory.
admin_overview.status_distribution_description: A quick read on how items are progressing through the system.

admin_items_queue.update_failed_description: The item could not be updated.
admin_items_queue.delete_failed_description: The item could not be removed.
admin_items_queue.search_placeholder: Search items by title, finder, or item code
admin_items_queue.no_items: No items match the current filters.
admin_items_queue.archived_description: This item has related records, so it was archived instead of deleted.
admin_items_queue.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this item?

admin_claims_queue.claim_update_failed_description: The claim could not be updated.
admin_claims_queue.search_placeholder: Search claims by item, claimant, or reason
admin_claims_queue.rating_approved_message: Your rating for {{title}} is now visible.
admin_claims_queue.rating_rejected_message: Your rating for {{title}} was not approved yet. You can edit and resubmit it from your dashboard.

sign_in_dialog.sign_in_failed_description: Please check your details and try again.
sign_in_dialog.title: Sign In
sign_in_dialog.description: Sign in with your name and school email to load your dashboard activity and claims.
sign_in_dialog.demo_help: Use either demo account to sign in. Admin tools unlock from the Student/Admin switch after sign-in with the admin password.

admin_access_dialog.title: Unlock Admin Tools
admin_access_dialog.description: Enter the {{school}} admin password to open moderation controls for the current signed-in session.
admin_access_dialog.unlocked_hint: Admin access stays unlocked until you sign out.
admin_access_dialog.password_help: This protects the admin dashboard, claim review queue, and restricted storage details. Support:
admin_access_dialog.unlocked_description: Moderation tools are now available in this browser session.

admin_route_guard.sign_in_unavailable_description: Unable to open the sign-in dialog.
admin_route_guard.unlock_unavailable_description: Unable to open the admin access dialog.
admin_route_guard.loading_description: Checking the current session before showing restricted moderation tools.
admin_route_guard.sign_in_required_description: This dashboard is restricted in the judging build. Sign in before unlocking the moderation workspace.
admin_route_guard.access_locked_description: Sign in is complete, but moderation tools are still protected. Enter the admin password to unlock the review workspace for this browser session.

page_not_found.title: Page Not Found
page_not_found.description: Looks like this page got lost too. Let's help you find your way back.

user_not_registered.title: Access Restricted
user_not_registered.description: You are not registered to use this application. Please contact the app administrator to request access.
user_not_registered.if_error: If you believe this is an error, you can:
user_not_registered.verify_account: Verify you are logged in with the correct account
user_not_registered.contact_admin: Contact the app administrator for access
user_not_registered.sign_in_again: Try logging out and back in again

photo_uploader.upload_area_label: Upload photos by clicking or dragging files here
photo_uploader.drag_drop: Drag & drop photos or click to browse
photo_uploader.max_photos: Max {{count}} photos, 10MB each. JPG, PNG, WEBP

lost_items.title: Lost Items
lost_items.subtitle: Browse items students and staff are looking for and see whether staff have already matched one to you.
